title: Print and return the first ten rabbit numbers
prompt_goal: Implement an action that takes no input and computes the first ten rabbit numbers, where R1 = 1, R2 = 1, and each later number is the sum of the previous two. Write each generated number as text and return the list of ten numbers.
public_forbidden: Do not use storage, network, time, randomness, filesystem, or external services.
Do not hardcode the full list as a direct return.
